subject: Computer Networking
title: Layer 3 Switches
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: Layer 3 Switches.

hook.text: What if a switch could also route? Layer 3 switches combine switching speed with routing intelligence.

buildup.text: Normal switches use MAC addresses. Layer 3 switches also understand IPs and route between VLANs.

discovery.text: They route between networks at wire speed in hardware — much faster than a software router.

twist.text: They can't fully replace routers. They lack WAN features, NAT, and advanced firewall capabilities.

climax.text: In campuses, Layer 3 switches handle inter-VLAN routing while routers handle the internet edge.

punchline.text: Layer 3 switches route at switch speed. Best of both worlds.

quiz.question: What extra capability does a Layer 3 switch have over a Layer 2 switch?
options: It can route traffic between different IP subnets
It can compress data before sending
